# Skill: React + Inertia Component

**Description:** Create or modify React components with Inertia.js + TypeScript.

**Rules:**
- Full TypeScript (no `any`)
- Small, focused components
- Business logic outside JSX when possible
- Use `useForm` from `@inertiajs/react` for mutations
- Reuse existing UI components (Headless UI + Tailwind)
- After creation → trigger Multi-Language Check
